C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503A LAWRENCE CURTICE, PRO TEM JUDGE. M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. BELDON YEE, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF. MUHAMED REDZIC, MANAGER OF HOTEL ISABEL WITH ATTY KEITH H. STEVENS. ALSO PRESENT, DEFT. JO A. ALEXANDER WITH ATTY JASON H. STEIN. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. DEFT. TO PAY $600 FOR DELIQUENT RENT FOR JUNE, JULY, AUGUST, AND SEPT 2001 ON OR BEFORE 4 PM SEPT. 15, 2001. ALSO, DEFT. PAYS ATTY FEES OF $700, BACK RENT OF $304, MAINTENANCE FEE FOR LOST KEY OF $5, RETURN CK FEE OF $15, LATE FEE OF $10, PLUS COSTS OF $96 FOR A TOTAL OF 1,130 AT $75 PER MONTH BY THE 5TH OF THE MONTH. PLUS, THE REGULARLY SCHEDULED RENT COMMENCING OCT, 5.2001 AND CONTINUING 5TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL SAID $1,130 IS PAID IN FULL. IF DEFT. COMPLIES, PLTF. WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE; HOWEVER, IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF. WILL FILE A JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT.
